productDisplayName: Reebok Men Sport Revesable Black Green Jacket
description: CompositionBlack and green sleeveless zippered jacket made of 100% polyester, with a built-up neckline, reversible, thick cotton ribbed linng around neckline on one side, buttoned pockets and one zipper pocket on one side,side pockets on the other, and brand name in reflective print on both sidesFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colors Do not bleach Do  not tumble dry Remove immediately Do not iron Iron print on reverse This black and green reebok jacket is two jackets rolled into one! Wear it with the black side out when you're at work, and with the neon green side out when you're hanging out with your friends. Pay for one, get two! The jacket is water and wind resistant, wicks away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable at all times, and adds a lot of zing to your outfit. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
